ddt:Target.Name: BVR_On_CAN_x52_JS3_Vdiag_08_v1.0
ddt:Target.Description:
ZF Automated Manual Transmission Applications: JS3 - X52 Software:2470 Date: 04/05/2015 Author: DCMAP-RTR / UET TA API: ROCTTT09 ------------------------------------------------------------------------ Reference document: DCMAP_RTR_2013_017_CdC_diag_X52_v10.3.doc -----------------------------------------------------------------------
V1.0 - created from BVR_On_CAN_x52_JS3_v2.4.xml with evolution of the VDIAG to $08
New DID's: $2E33, $2E34, $2E35, $2F77, $2F78, $2F79, $2F7A, $2F7B, $2F7C, $2F7D, $2F7E, $2F81, $2F82, $2F83
New FT added for several DTC's: P0780 - FT: $62, $67, $75, $77, $91, $92, $94 P0805 - FT: $1F P0904 - FT: $1F P0914 - FT: $1F P0820 - FT: $29
The following DID's were added for S&S function: $2F70 - AT_StartStopMode status $2F71 - AT_StartStopRequest status $2F72 - AT_StartStopFailureFlag status $2F73 - ECM_StartStopStatus status $2F74 - Auto Stop inhibition $2F75 - Auto Restart request $2F76 - Auto Restart inhibition

Data.Name: Actual allowed duty cycle of clutch actuator

Item.Text: Auto Shift Manual Adaptive Learning Not Complete
Gear Lever X-Y Position Sensor Circuit
General gearbox failure in Neutral position
Internal Control Module A/D Processing Performance
Internal Control Module Memory Check Sum Error
Internal Control Module Monitoring Processor Performance
Lost Communication With Anti-Lock Brake System (ABS) Control Module
Lost Communication With Body Control Module
Lost Communication With Instrument Panel Cluster (IPC) Control Module
Circuit Short To Ground Or Open
Circuit Short To Battery Or Open
Signal Rate Of Change Below Threshold
Signal Rate Of Change Above Threshold
Signal Bias Out Of Range / Zero Adjustment Failure
Signal Has Too Few Transitions / Events
Signal Has Too Many Transitions / Events
Alive / Sequence Counter Incorrect / Not Updated
Value Of Signal Protection Calculation Incorrect

Data.Name: Vehicle Speed
Data.Comment: This is the average of front wheels speed from CAN

Data.Name: Customer Statistic Gearbox 1.Number of Engagement in Gear BW
Customer Statistic Gearbox 1.Number of Engagement in Gear 5
Customer Statistic Gearbox 1.Number of Engagement in Gear 4
Customer Statistic Gearbox 1.Number of Engagement in Gear 3
Customer Statistic Gearbox 1.Number of Engagement in Gear 2
Customer Statistic Gearbox 1.Number of Engagement in Gear 1
Customer Statistic Gearbox 1.Number of Engagement in Gear 6
Customer Statistic Gearbox 1.Number of Engagement in Gear N
Move gearbox actuator to the assembly position
Move gearbox to the disassembly position
Move gearbox actuator to the assembly position.stop
Move gearbox to the disassembly position.stop
Teached in mechanical disengaged clutch position
Teached in mechanical engaged clutch position
ABS_ESP values on CAN.MSR in regulation
ABS_ESP values on CAN.ASR in regulation
OBD Calibration Identification.Number of data items
OBD Calibration Verification Number.Number of data items

Item.Text: exact torque request can not be achieved
transient state preventing torque request realised
torque request can not be achieved

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.DTCOccurrenceCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: Clutch actuator state.engaged position is learned
Clutch actuator state.disengaged position is learned
Clutch actuator state.clutch position controller is activated
Clutch actuator state.error on control deviation
Clutch actuator state.actuator in engaged position
Clutch actuator state.actuator in disengaged position
Shift motor limphome counter
Data.Comment: Counter of Shift motor limphome modes

Data.Name: Select motor limphome counter
Data.Comment: Counter of Select motor limphome modes

Data.Name: Gear 1 shift motor reinitialisation counter
Data.Comment: Counter of shift motor reinitialisation at/in gear 1

Data.Name: Gear 2 shift motor reinitialisation counter
Data.Comment: Counter of shift motor reinitialisation at/in gear 2

Data.Name: Gear 3 shift motor reinitialisation counter
Data.Comment: Counter of shift motor reinitialisation at/in gear 3

Data.Name: Gear 4 shift motor reinitialisation counter
Data.Comment: Counter of shift motor reinitialisation at/in gear 4

Data.Name: Gear 5 shift motor reinitialisation counter
Data.Comment: Counter of shift motor reinitialisation at/in gear 5

Data.Name: Gear R shift motor reinitialisation counter
Data.Comment: Counter of shift motor reinitialisation at/in gear R

Data.Name: Auto Restart inhibition.Clutch overload protection error
Auto Restart inhibition.Clutch does not disengage
Auto Restart inhibition.Clutch position sensor failure detected
Data.Comment: Bit 4: Clutch position sensor - failure detected

Data.Name: Auto Restart inhibition.Clutch position range or gradient check failed
Data.Comment: Bit 3: Clutch position: range/gradient check failed

Data.Name: Auto Restart inhibition.Clutch actuator power stage SCB
Data.Comment: Bit 2: Clutch actuator - power stage: short circuit to battery

Data.Name: Auto Restart inhibition.Clutch actuator power stage SCG
Data.Comment: Bit 1: Clutch actuator - power stage: short circuit to ground

Data.Name: Auto Restart inhibition.TCU internal A/D changer test failed
Data.Comment: Bit 0: TCU internal A/D changer test failed

Data.Name: Auto Restart request.Gearlever connection lever stuck
Auto Restart request.Gearlever connection invalid position recognized
Auto Restart request.Driver torque demand out of range
Auto Restart request.Actual engine torque out of range
Auto Restart request.Engine speed range check
Auto Restart request.ECU CAN timeout failure
Auto Restart request.General CAN bus error
Auto Restart request.More than one gear cannot be engaged
Auto Restart request.Unsuccessful gear engaging during the last ignition cycle
Auto Restart request.Battery voltage short term voltage drop
Auto Stop inhibition.CLUTCH actuator mechanical fault detected
Auto Stop inhibition.CLUTCH actuator thermal protection
Auto Stop inhibition.SELECT position sensor voltage over 5.5V
Auto Stop inhibition.SELECT position sensor voltage over 9.5V
Auto Stop inhibition.SHIFT position sensor voltage over 5.5V
Auto Stop inhibition.SHIFT position sensor voltage over 9.5V
Auto Stop inhibition.SHIFT position sensor failure detected
Auto Stop inhibition.SELECT position sensor failure detected
Auto Stop inhibition.SELECT actuator sensor power supply H-bridge SCB
Auto Stop inhibition.SELECT actuator sensor power supply H-bridge SCG
Auto Stop inhibition.SHIFT actuator sensor power supply H-bridge SCB
Auto Stop inhibition.SHIFT actuator sensor power supply H-bridge SCG
Auto Stop inhibition.SELECT actuator supply voltage sensor SCB
Auto Stop inhibition.SELECT actuator supply voltage sensor SCG
Auto Stop inhibition.SHIFT actuator sensor power supply SCB
Auto Stop inhibition.SHIFT actuator sensor power supply SCG

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportDTC
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportSnapshot
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests / Clip import : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: TesterPresent.WithResponse
Request.Comment: This request enable P2P tester present for tool (Screen, IOctl, ...)

Request.Name: DataRead.Identification.RenaultR2
Request.Comment: ReadDataByLocalIdentifier : Use this request if ECU use Coding Renault R2 or 5DIGITS

DataItem.Name: Customer Statistic Gearbox 1.Number of Engagement in Gear 1
Customer Statistic Gearbox 1.Number of Engagement in Gear 2
Customer Statistic Gearbox 1.Number of Engagement in Gear 3
Customer Statistic Gearbox 1.Number of Engagement in Gear 4
Customer Statistic Gearbox 1.Number of Engagement in Gear 5
Customer Statistic Gearbox 1.Number of Engagement in Gear 6
Customer Statistic Gearbox 1.Number of Engagement in Gear N
Customer Statistic Gearbox 1.Number of Engagement in Gear BW

Request.Name: DataRead.Actual allowed duty cycle of clutch actuator

DataItem.Name: Actual allowed duty cycle of clutch actuator
Clutch actuator state.actuator in disengaged position
Clutch actuator state.actuator in engaged position
Clutch actuator state.error on control deviation
Clutch actuator state.clutch position controller is activated
Clutch actuator state.disengaged position is learned
Clutch actuator state.engaged position is learned

Request.Name: ClearFailures
Request.Comment: The ClearDiagnosticInformation service is used by the tool to clear diagnostic information in an ECUs memory

DataItem.Name: ABS_ESP values on CAN.ASR in regulation
ABS_ESP values on CAN.MSR in regulation

Request.Name: Move gearbox actuator to the assembly position
Move gearbox to the disassembly position
Move gearbox actuator to the assembly position.status

DataItem.Name: Move gearbox actuator to the assembly position

Request.Name: Move gearbox to the disassembly position.status

DataItem.Name: Move gearbox to the disassembly position

Request.Name: Move gearbox actuator to the assembly position.stop

DataItem.Name: Move gearbox actuator to the assembly position.stop

Request.Name: Move gearbox to the disassembly position.stop

DataItem.Name: Move gearbox to the disassembly position.stop

OBD Calibration Verification Number.Number of data items

DataItem.Name: Teached in mechanical disengaged clutch position

Request.Name: DataRead.Teached in mechanical engaged clutch position

DataItem.Name: Teached in mechanical engaged clutch position

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.AgingCounter
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData.Mileage
Request.Comment: Request for the import in the Clip

Request.Name: ReadDTCInformation.ReportExtendedData
Request.Comment: DDT2000 Failures page requests : Unusable in the standard tools of DDT2000

Request.Name: DataRead.Gear R shift motor reinitialisation counter

DataItem.Name: Gear R shift motor reinitialisation counter

Device.Name: Auto Shift Manual Adaptive Learning Not Complete
General gearbox failure in Neutral position
Internal Control Module Memory Check Sum Error
Internal Control Module Monitoring Processor Performance
Internal Control Module A/D Processing Performance
Gear Lever X-Y Position Sensor Circuit
Lost Communication With Anti-Lock Brake System (ABS) Control Module
Lost Communication With Body Control Module
Lost Communication With Instrument Panel Cluster (IPC) Control Module

Label.Text: Make sure to write valid VIN with the associated CRC

Display.DataName: ABS_ESP values on CAN.ASR in regulation
ABS_ESP values on CAN.MSR in regulation
Clutch actuator state.engaged position is learned
Clutch actuator state.disengaged position is learned
Clutch actuator state.clutch position controller is activated
Clutch actuator state.error on control deviation
Clutch actuator state.actuator in engaged position
Clutch actuator state.actuator in disengaged position
Teached in mechanical disengaged clutch position
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Teached in mechanical disengaged clutch position

Display.DataName: Teached in mechanical engaged clutch position
Display.RequestName: DataRead.Teached in mechanical engaged clutch position

Label.Text: Initial conditions: engine on, vehicle speed = 0, gearbox in neutral, input shaft speed = 0
Initial conditions: engine OFF, ignition ON, no errors on gearbox actuators or sensors
Battery voltage >9V for all learnings procedure
Initial conditions: engine OFF, ignition ON, gearbox teaching OK, no errors on gearbox actuators or sensors, battery voltage >9V
Initial conditions: engine OFF, ignition ON, battery voltage >9V, no errors on clutch actuator or sensor
Initial conditions: engine OFF, ignition ON, battery voltage >9V, no errors on clutch actuators or sensor
